fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and free cash flow but struggles with profitability and carries a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY indicates strong market demand for its services.
Free cash flow of $463.32M TTM demonstrates solid cash generation capabilities.
Forward P/E of 44.00 is reasonable given the high revenue growth rate.
Consensus analyst rating is 'buy' with a mean target price of $358.82.
negatives: Profit margin is negative at -2.9%, indicating the company is not yet profitable on a net basis.
Operating margin is flat at 0.0%, showing no operating profit.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.13 is high, suggesting significant leverage.
Price/Sales ratio of 10.18 is high, indicating a premium valuation.

news.paragraph: MongoDB's Instruqt platform was highlighted by Google Cloud for training practitioners on AI, suggesting strong enterprise adoption and integration. This follows recent commentary noting the stock's significant one-year rally and the company's valuation being supported by AI momentum and analyst optimism. With the next earnings report due imminently, investors will be watching for continued growth and profitability metrics.
